Package org.eventb.core.preferences.autotactics

Interface ITacticProfileCache

All Known Implementing Classes:
TacticsProfilesCache
public interface ITacticProfileCache
Common protocol for tactics profile caches.

Instances can be obtained by calling TacticPreferenceFactory.makeTacticProfileCache(org.eclipse.core.runtime.preferences.IEclipsePreferences)

Since:
3.0

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    add(String name, ITacticDescriptor tactic)
    Adds a new item given its name and its value to the cache if an element with this name does not already exists .
    List<IPrefMapEntry<ITacticDescriptor>>
    addAll(List<IPrefMapEntry<ITacticDescriptor>> entries)
    Adds a list of given IPrefMapEntry to the cache.
    void
    addListener(ICacheListener<ITacticDescriptor> listener)
    Adds the given ICacheListener to the list of cache listeners.
    boolean
    exists(String name)
    Tells whether a profile with the given name is present in the cache.
    List<IPrefMapEntry<ITacticDescriptor>>
    getEntries()
    Returns all profiles of the cache.
    IPrefMapEntry<ITacticDescriptor>
    getEntry(String name)
    Returns the profile of the cache which has the given name.
    Set<String>
    getEntryNames()
    Returns all profile names in the cache.
    IInjectLog
    inject(String pref)
    Loads the cache with elements created from the given string parameter.
    boolean
    isDefaultEntry(String name)
    Returns whether the given name is a key for a default entry in this preference map.
    void
    load()
    Loads this cache from preference store.
    void
    loadDefault()
    Loads the default value from preference store.
    IPreferenceCheckResult
    preAddCheck(String key, ITacticDescriptor value)
    Checks whether adding given key with given value into given map introduces cyclic references.
    void
    remove(String... names)
    Remove the entries with the given names from the cache.
    void
    store()
    Stores this cache to preference store.

  • Method Details

    • add

      void add(String name, ITacticDescriptor tactic)
      Adds a new item given its name and its value to the cache if an element with this name does not already exists .
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the profile to be added to the cache
      tactic - the descriptor of the tactic profile to be added to the cache

    • addAll

      List<IPrefMapEntry<ITacticDescriptor>> addAll(List<IPrefMapEntry<ITacticDescriptor>> entries)
      Adds a list of given IPrefMapEntry to the cache.
      Parameters:
      entries - the entries to add
      Returns:
      the entries which were actually added to the cache

    • addListener

      void addListener(ICacheListener<ITacticDescriptor> listener)
      Adds the given ICacheListener to the list of cache listeners.
      Parameters:
      listener - the listener to be added

    • exists

      boolean exists(String name)
      Tells whether a profile with the given name is present in the cache.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the profile to search for
      Returns:
      true if the profile is in the cache, false otherwise

    • getEntries

      List<IPrefMapEntry<ITacticDescriptor>> getEntries()
      Returns all profiles of the cache.
      Returns:
      all profiles of the cache

    • getEntry

      IPrefMapEntry<ITacticDescriptor> getEntry(String name)
      Returns the profile of the cache which has the given name.
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the profile to return
      Returns:
      the registered profile with the given name, null if no profile with this name is in the cache.

    • getEntryNames

      Set<String> getEntryNames()
      Returns all profile names in the cache.
      Returns:
      the profile names in the cache

    • isDefaultEntry

      boolean isDefaultEntry(String name)
      Returns whether the given name is a key for a default entry in this preference map.
      Parameters:
      name - an entry name
      Returns:
      true if default entry, false otherwise
      Since:
      3.0

    • load

      void load()
      Loads this cache from preference store.

    • loadDefault

      void loadDefault()
      Loads the default value from preference store.

    • remove

      void remove(String... names)
      Remove the entries with the given names from the cache.

      Important: don't use remove() then add() to rename an entry. Instead, use getEntry().setKey().

      Parameters:
      names - the names of the entries to remove

    • store

      void store()
      Stores this cache to preference store.

    • inject

      IInjectLog inject(String pref) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Loads the cache with elements created from the given string parameter.

      If inject fails, an IllegalArgumentException is thrown.

      Parameters:
      pref - the information to load the cache with
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - in case of failure

    • preAddCheck

      IPreferenceCheckResult preAddCheck(String key, ITacticDescriptor value)
      Checks whether adding given key with given value into given map introduces cyclic references.

      If the given key already exists, it is considered as a replacement, so the corresponding entry is not taken into account, only the new one.

      Parameters:
      key - a new map key
      value - a value about to be added
      Returns:
      a IPreferenceCheckResult
